query:
SELECT wc.id, wc.remoteJid, wc.status as wc_status, wc.assignedUserId, ca.status as ca_status, ca.resolvedAt 
FROM wa_conversations wc 
JOIN conversation_assignments ca ON ca.sessionId = wc.sessionId AND ca.remoteJid = wc.remoteJid AND ca.tenantId = wc.tenantId
WHERE ca.status = 'resolved' AND wc.status = 'open'
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT wc.id, wc.remoteJid, wc.status as wc_status, wc.assignedUserId, ca.status as ca_status, ca.resolvedAt 
FROM wa_conversations wc 
JOIN conversation_assignments ca ON ca.sessionId = wc.sessionId AND ca.remoteJid = wc.remoteJid AND ca.tenantId = wc.tenantId
WHERE ca.status = 'resolved' AND wc.status = 'open'
LIMIT 10;
